channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Daily Superquiz and Mini Crossword Puzzles for April 28, 2026
item.description: The Age's Superquiz for Tuesday, 28 April 2026, offers readers a range of interactive puzzle experiences. Alongside the Superquiz, the publication also features a Mini Crossword, designed with ten clu...

item.title: Le'Veon Bell Alleges Former Coach Adam Gase Used Cocaine During Jets Tenure
item.description: Former NFL running back Le'Veon Bell made serious allegations against his former head coach, Adam Gase, claiming he witnessed Gase using cocaine in his office multiple times. Bell, who played under Ga...

item.title: Experts Advocate for Telepsychiatry to Expand Mental Health Services Across Kenya
item.description: During the 27th Annual Scientific Conference held in Nanyuki, mental health specialists in Kenya urged fellow professionals to embrace digital platforms, particularly telepsychiatry, to enhance access...

item.title: Inquest examines emergency response following fatal injury to ice hockey player Adam Johnson
item.description: An inquest into the death of ice hockey player Adam Johnson has heard detailed accounts describing a “chaotic scene” following the fatal injury he sustained during a match in October 2023. Johnson, a ...

item.title: Government launches free inputs distribution for over 549,000 cashew farmers in southern Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzanian government through the Cashewnut Board of Tanzania (CBT) has started distributing subsidised inputs free of charge to support cashew farmers for the 2026/27 season. A total of 549,936 fa...

item.title: Man charged after armed incident at Washington gala attended by Donald Trump
item.description: A 31-year-old California man, identified as Cole Allen, is scheduled to appear in a Washington federal court following a shooting incident at a gala dinner attended by former U.S. president Donald Tru...

item.title: Cognitive Changes May Signal Time to Stop Driving, Study Finds
item.description: A recent study has revealed a significant link between subtle cognitive decline and the decision for older adults to relinquish driving privileges. Researchers observed that even minor changes in cogn...

item.title: Xavier Becerra gains momentum in California governor race amid scrutiny of long public service record
item.description: Xavier Becerra, former U.S. Health and Human Services secretary and California attorney general, has experienced a notable surge in the 2026 California governor’s race, drawing renewed attention to bo...

item.title: UP Student and Peasant Organizer Maureen Keil Santuyo Killed in Negros Occidental
item.description: Maureen Keil Santuyo, a student at the University of the Philippines Open University and a dedicated peasant organizer, was among 19 individuals killed in an alleged encounter with government forces i...

item.title: Geraldine Lerena's innovative knockout prize boosts SA boxing
item.description: Promoter Geraldine Lerena received widespread praise for introducing an innovative knockout bonus at her boxing tournament in Sandton. The event, held at the Galleria Conference and Events Hall, offer...

item.title: DR Congo Announces Creation of 20,000-Strong Mining Guard to Protect Mineral Sites and Supply Chains
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo don announce say dem go set up one special paramilitary unit wey dem call 'mining guard' to secure all dia mining sites and the whole mineral exploitation chain. This ...

item.title: Archbishop of Canterbury meets Pope Leo for prayer at the Vatican
item.description: In a significant event, the Archbishop of Canterbury and Pope Leo met at the Vatican for a historic prayer session, symbolising a rare moment of unity between the Anglican and Catholic Churches. This ...

item.title: Paul Muite Criticises Senate for Impeaching Rigathi Gachagua During ICU Admission
item.description: In a recent hearing at the Milimani Law Courts, senior counsel Paul Muite criticised the Senate for rushing the impeachment of former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua while he was admitted to the ICU...

item.title: Super Eagles Head Coach Eric Chelle in Contract Negotiations Standoff with NFF
item.description: The future of Super Eagles head coach Eric Chelle hangs in the balance as contract extension talks with the Nigeria Football Federation (NFF) have hit a major roadblock due to financial disagreements....

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Introduces Competitive AI Performance at Significantly Lower Cost
item.description: DeepSeek, a Chinese AI startup backed by quantitative hedge fund High-Flyer Capital Management, has released its latest model, DeepSeek-V4, marking a significant development in the competitive artific...

item.title: North East Students' Organisation urges urgent action to end violence in Manipur
item.description: The North East Students' Organisation (NESO), representing student bodies across the North Eastern states, has strongly appealed for immediate measures to halt the ongoing violence in Manipur. In a st...

item.title: YouTuber Elodie Zone Shares Engagement News with Fans
item.description: Kenyan YouTuber and content creator Elodie Zone has shared exciting news with her fans a year after moving to Toronto, Canada. On April 27, 2026, she announced her engagement and displayed her long-aw...

item.title: Suspected Gunman Identified in Shooting at Trump Dinner
item.description: Authorities have arrested Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old from Torrance, California, in connection with the shooting outside the White House Correspondents' Association dinner at the Washington Hilton...

item.title: Palace assures all barangays will receive aid amid fuel crisis
item.description: Malacañang confirmed that all barangays in the Philippines will receive government assistance amid the ongoing fuel crisis, regardless of the political affiliations of their local leaders or represent...

item.title: Philippines and US Conduct Joint Counter-Landing Military Drills
item.description: The Philippines and the United States recently carried out counter-landing exercises as part of their annual joint military drills. These exercises, which are part of the ongoing Balikatan series, aim...
